WANG YUXIANG
← 返回首页 ← Back to Home

Nuke 项目 Nuke Project

该项目主要是对于自己nuke学习的总结与展示，包括抠像，跟踪，与颜色管理等。 A summary and showcase of my Nuke learning, including keying, tracking, and color management.

屏幕替换 Screen Replacement
将原始屏幕内容替换为目标画面。 Replaced on-screen content with target footage.
相机跟踪 Camera Tracking
完成实拍镜头的三维相机解算。 Completed 3D camera solve for live-action footage.
文字替换 Text Replacement
替换画面中的原有文字信息。 Replaced existing text information in the footage.
绿幕背景替换 Green Screen Replacement
完成抠像并重建新的背景环境。 Completed keying and rebuilt background environment.
